ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "capita_gdp" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., continent, sub-region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on HDI */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* Value of the HDI (between 0 and 1) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HDI data was collected */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Education index value */,
  "income_index" REAL /* Income index value */,
  "gni_pcapita" REAL /* Gross National Income per capita */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpi_data" (
  "cpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPI entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "cpi_value" REAL /* Value of the CPI (higher means less corruption) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the CPI data was collected */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on CPI */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the economic indicator data was collected */,
  "indicator_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_indicator_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("indicator_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_hdi_data" (
  "historical_hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical HDI entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* Historical value of the HDI */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical HDI data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Historical life expectancy at birth */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Historical education index value */,
  "income_index" REAL /* Historical income index value */,
  "gni_pcapita" REAL /* Historical Gross National Income per capita */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_hdi_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and audit purposes */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report is public */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("indicator_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the source data */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "indicator_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator type */,
  "indicator_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator type (e.g., HDI, CPI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_type_id")
)
